summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CECyTE 04 Dreams App (Maquina de Programación de Sueños). All major features tested including backend APIs, frontend UI, admin panel, simulator, and virtual tour.

flaky_endpoints.issue: AI image generation works but may be slow due to external service

ui_bugs.issue: Initial selector query returned 0 buildings, but debug shows 5 buildings are properly rendered
ui_bugs.note: This is a timing issue - buildings load after 3D rendering completes

passed_tests: ✅ Campus info endpoint with coordinates working
✅ GPT-5.2 story generation working (1537 char story generated)
✅ GPT Image 1 generation working (base64 image returned)
✅ Landing page loads with proper title and navigation
✅ Virtual Tour 3D rendering with 5 specialty buildings
✅ Admin panel access and login functionality
✅ Admin tarjetas position editor with X,Y,Z controls
